scripts.dev:desktop: pnpm build:cli:desktop && pnpm build:web && pnpm --filter @band-app/desktop build && node scripts/dev-desktop.mjs
scripts.build:desktop: pnpm build:cli:desktop && pnpm build:web && pnpm --filter @band-app/desktop build && pnpm --filter @band-app/desktop package
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @band-app/server test && cargo test --manifest-path apps/cli/Cargo.toml && pnpm --filter @band-app/desktop test
scripts.lint: biome check . && cargo clippy --manifest-path apps/cli/Cargo.toml -- -D warnings
scripts.check: biome check . && cargo fmt --manifest-path apps/cli/Cargo.toml -- --check && cargo clippy --manifest-path apps/cli/Cargo.toml -- -D warnings
